commit.message:
Add context tokens field to Local mode

Adds a persistent "Context tokens" field in the Local Settings box
(below the Model field, default 32768). At launch, the value is
injected as OLLAMA_NUM_CTX and LM_STUDIO_NUM_CTX so both Ollama and
LM Studio use the configured context window. Values below 32768 are
clamped. The setting is saved and restored across sessions.

Fix crawler pipeline: remove broken partition filter and fix Flyway version

- Remove partition-based URL filtering from CrawlScheduler that silently
  dropped URLs dequeued by the wrong downloader instance
- Remove incompatible flyway-database-postgresql:10.8.1 dependency that
  crashed url-seen (AbstractMethodError with flyway-core 9.x)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

ping_agent: remove status updates, delegate to auth_agent

Ping agent now only records metrics and updates last_ping_at.
Status (online/offline) is managed exclusively by auth_agent.

Fix Gradle SIGSEGV crash in Docker builds on ARM (Apple Silicon)

Switch build stage from eclipse-temurin:21-jdk-alpine to eclipse-temurin:21-jdk
to avoid musl libc native library crash, and add --no-watch-fs flag.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Simplify connection path in architecture diagram

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Update architecture diagram via draw.io desktop editor

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement distributed web crawler with 6 microservices

Java 21 / Spring Boot 3.2 / Kafka-based pipeline:
- Seed URL Controller: REST API for submitting crawl seeds
- URL Frontier: politeness-enforced, disk-backed URL queue
- HTML Downloader (x3): virtual thread downloads with robots.txt
- Link Extractor (x2): Jsoup-based link parsing
- URL Filter: extension/domain/depth filtering
- URL Seen: Bloom filter + PostgreSQL deduplication

Includes Docker Compose (14 containers), Prometheus/Grafana
monitoring, unit tests, README, and draw.io architecture diagram.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(sprint-4): payments, planning, dashboard + review fixes

Sprint 4 — nouvelles fonctionnalités :
- Modèle Payment (Prisma) + migration add-payments
- API paiements : /api/orders/[id]/payments, /api/payments, /api/payments/[id]/receipt
- API facture PDF : /api/orders/[id]/invoice
- API stats dashboard : /api/dashboard/stats (param period)
- Composants : PaymentSummary, PaymentForm, PaymentHistory
- Pages : /dashboard/payments, /dashboard/calendar
- Dashboard : KPIs réels, commandes récentes, échéances 7j

Revue complète sprints 1-4 — corrections :
- fix(monetary): totalPaid stocké en FCFA (cohérent avec totalPrice), conversion centimes→FCFA lors agrégation
- fix(orders): auto-création Payment(ADVANCE) à la création commande si avance > 0

fix(build): remove JSX.Element return types to fix Vercel TS build

JSX namespace isn't available without explicit React import in this
tsconfig setup. Dropping the redundant explicit return types lets TS
infer them, unblocking the Vercel production build.

commit.message:
fix(build): exclude test files from tsc -b and restore JSX types

- Add src/vite-env.d.ts (standard Vite pattern) so vite/client types
  are available without overriding TypeScript's "types" field
- Remove "types": ["vite/client"] from tsconfig.app.json — this was
  blocking @types/react auto-discovery, causing JSX.Element errors
- Exclude *.test.ts/tsx from tsconfig.app.json so production build
  does not compile Vitest globals (vi, describe, expect)

commit.message:
fix: add local fallback declaration for sanitize-html

@types/sanitize-html lives in devDependencies, so npm install with
NODE_ENV=production omits it on Render, causing TS7016 at build time.

Added src/types/sanitize-html.d.ts with a full ambient declaration
covering sanitizeHtml(dirty, options) and the Options interface.
TypeScript uses @types/sanitize-html locally when present; the local
file is the fallback on Render where devDependencies are skipped.

Verified: tsc --noEmit (0 errors) and tsc --noEmit --typeRoots "[]"
(0 errors — simulates no @types in environment).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat(runtime): wire event emitter + cost tracker into agent-execute (#324) (#400)

* feat(runtime): wire event emitter + cost tracker into agent-execute (#324)

Integrate AgentEventEmitter, CostTracker, and ExecutionRegistry into the
agent execution pipeline for operator visibility.

- AgentEventEmitter: persists structured events to agent_event table and
  broadcasts via SSE (llm_call_end, tool_call_start/end, session_end)
- CostTracker: accumulates per-job token/cost usage; enforces
  costBudgetUsd from agent resource_limits (cancels on exceed)
- ExecutionRegistry: process-singleton Map<jobId, ExecutionHandle> for
  kill-switch API; register on start, unregister in finally block
- Job completion persists tokens_in/out, cost_usd, llm_call_count,
  tool_call_count; session cost accumulators updated
- All new operations are non-fatal (catch + swallow) to avoid blocking
  the execution pipeline

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(lint): restore require-await disable comment in execution-registry test

CI uses stricter config than local; restore the eslint-disable directive
for the async mock result() method.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: OIDC ID tokens, token revocation, account lockout, and security hardening for v1.0.0

- Add OIDC ID token generation with at_hash and nonce claims (OpenID Connect Core 1.0)
- Add token revocation endpoint (RFC 7009) at /oauth/revoke
- Add account lockout with configurable max attempts and lockout duration
- Add Content-Type validation middleware (415 for non-JSON on POST endpoints)
- Add background cleanup goroutine for expired authorization codes
- Add nonce parameter flow through authorize → auth code → ID token
- Update all 5 login themes with nonce hidden fields and social login nonce params
- Fix CSP to allow inline scripts for admin console
- Add migrations for account lockout fields and nonce column

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Field intelligence rework — replace budget-vs-actual with timecard activity analysis

Rate card system rethought: no longer compares budget to actual or flags variance.
Instead, analyzes timecard activity per cost code — most active codes have the richest
data for estimating. Key changes:

- Remove UnitCostCalculator, add assess_confidence(tc_count, work_days) + safe_divide()
- $/unit now includes BOTH labor + equipment cost divided by quantity
- Crew breakdown captures labor trade codes (OE4, LA1) AND equipment types
- Confidence based on data richness (HIGH/MODERATE/LOW/NONE), not % complete
- New _flatten_equipment() captures equipment array from HCSS timecard API
- Schema v1.7: employee_code on hj_timecard, hj_equipment_entry table, rate_item field intel columns
- _get() helper for dict/Pydantic model compatibility in rate_card.py
- Tests: 136 passing (rewrote TestUnitCostCalculator → TestSafeDivide + TestAssessConfidence)

commit.message:
fix: exercise() missing player param across 6 files

25+ calls to exercise(A_*, ...) were passing the attribute constant as
the player parameter, causing exercise() to return early and skip RNG
consumption. Fixed in dokick.js (16), eat.js (1), polyself.js (1),
potion.js (3), pray.js (1), trap.js (4). Also fixed b_trapped() call
missing player/map params in dokick.js.

commit.message:
feat(invite): add bot-driven user invite flow

Adds POST /api/v1/invites authenticated via BOT_API_SECRET. Keycloak
creates the user with UPDATE_PASSWORD, UPDATE_PROFILE, and VERIFY_EMAIL
required actions; its native email delivery handles the invite. Users
pick their preferred username during onboarding, which MAS reads as the
Matrix localpart on first login via the preferred_username OIDC claim.

Includes maubot plugin (maubot-invite/) with an !invite <email> command
restricted to a configurable OPS room ID.

BOT_API_SECRET is now a required env var. See .env.example.

commit.message:
Implement learn --evolve: auto-evolve patterns from observations

Pattern evolution now works from local observations + catalog signals:
- Augments existing patterns with new recipe steps from strong useful signals
- Creates new learned patterns from unattached signals grouped by path prefix
- Excludes nodes with strong noise signals
- Infers scope (path_pattern) from node paths
- Writes evolved patterns to .contextually/patterns/ and catalog
- Supports --dry-run to preview without writing
- 2 new integration tests (dry-run + writes-pattern)

commit.message:
Persist through service stop/restart instead of exiting

Replace the one-shot watch_service_stop with a channel-based
spawn_service_watcher that emits Started/Stopped events, allowing
jscreen to stay running across service lifecycle. On stop, show
[service stopped] and keep the TUI alive; on restart, show
[service started] and reconnect the write path automatically.

Write failures now print [service not running — line dropped] instead
of exiting. For Child mode, reconnection uses non-interactive
doas/sudo (-n flag) since raw mode prevents password prompts.

Add --exit-on-stop flag to opt into the old exit-on-stop behavior.

commit.message:
Fix confetti visibility issue

The confetti was being drawn behind the overlay, making it invisible.
Solution: Draw the confetti animation for up to 3 seconds BEFORE displaying
the overlay. This ensures the celebratory confetti is visible when the player
achieves a new high score.

- Confetti now animates on canvas before overlay appears
- Maximum confetti duration: 3 seconds or until confetti settles
- Overlay displays after confetti animation completes or timeout
